content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with all sectors green. IT (+1.52%), Pharma (+1.11%), Metals (+1.41%), Realty (+1.23%) leading. VIX down to 19. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +1.63%). Book is already 68% deployed and showing positive unrealized P&L — focus is on managing existing winners, not adding aggressively.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 results (+27% PAT, GNPA 1.45%), PSU bank index leading. CMP 77.90 recovering. Tighten SL from 74.50 to 76.50 (just below S2 76.95 / -1.8% from CMP) to cap risk; thesis intact, target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong winner (+6.8%). Q4 result blowout, brokerage TP 1143. CMP 1049 has cleared prior resistance. Trail SL up to 1015 (above entry 984, locks in ~3% gain) and raise target to 1140 to align with brokerage TP. SL 1030 was actually fine but moving down to 1015 — wait, current SL is 1030.47, that's tighter; per system rule SL can only be tightened on longs (raised). Keep SL at 1030.47 unchanged. Will only raise target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.47,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior — keep SL at 1030.47 (already locks in gain), raise target from 1100 to 1140 to align with brokerage TP of 1143 given strong Q4 print and momentum continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Flat P&L. Gold pulled back recently but structural backdrop intact (central bank buying, geopolitics). No need to adjust SL 119 / target 135 — both reasonable. Hold as portfolio insurance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+27% PAT, beat consensus), made fresh 52w high. CMP 1436. Current SL 1410 already near entry. Tighten SL marginally to entry 1412.94 (breakeven, locks zero loss). Target unchanged at 1480 (~3% upside). Risk minimal now."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 176,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "AU Bank reports Q4 TODAY post-market with binary event risk. Brokerage TPs Rs 600-720 are well below CMP, signalling some sell-side caution. Stock at 52w high with stretched valuation pre-earnings, MFI/SFB stress flagged sector-wide. Position is flat (-0.4%). Better to flatten and re-enter post-print on confirmed reaction than carry binary risk overnight. SL is already AT entry (1049.05) so risk-reward asymmetric on downside gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 681.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 29) — binary event. Position +1.9%. SL at entry 681 is fine (breakeven). Keep tight — this is essentially HOLD with no SL/target change. Will reconsider EXIT closer to event if no further upside. Actually no change to values — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days (Apr 30) — binary event risk. CMP 2327 recovering. SL 2260 (-2.9% from CMP) is reasonable. Sector tailwinds (GST reforms, rural demand). Hold through event with current SL providing protection. Premium valuation is a risk but Nestle's strong print is supportive read-across."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +0.4%, near 52w high. Power sector strong. Trail SL from 393 to entry 404.50 (breakeven, locks risk to zero). Target 425 unchanged — analyst consensus 400-440 supports upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + EV anode/SCB story. Volume 10.6x is impressive but stock already gapped to 569 then sold off to 549 intraday — buy-the-rumour-sell-the-news risk on today's earnings call. Book is 68% deployed; not adding fresh chemicals exposure on a volatile gap day."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already opened gap-up to 1737 then sold off to 1690 in first hour — failed breakout intraday. Near 52w high, MarketsMojo downgrade. Book already has NTPC + ADANIENSOL on watchlist as power exposure; cluster discipline argues against adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIENSOL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high but Q4 margin compression flagged, no dividend, mgmt changes. Adani group event-cluster risk this week. Power cluster already represented by NTPC. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "UTIAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Posted net LOSS in Q4, stock fell 11%. Avoid catching falling knife despite Motilal target."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ABSLAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT down 30% QoQ, at ATH with limited upside vs Equirus TP 1100. Risk-reward unfavorable for fresh entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 74.50 to 76.50 to reduce risk. Strong Q4 fundamentals, PSU bank index leading."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.47,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in gain. Raising target to 1140 to capture brokerage TP momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position. SL/target intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Move to entry/breakeven post strong Q4 print. 52w high, momentum continuing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings TODAY, binary risk, brokerage TPs below CMP. Flat P&L — exit and reassess post-print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 681.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 2 days. SL at entry. Hold cautiously, may exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 3 days. Recovering from lows. Current SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven. Power sector strong, near 52w high."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL — re-evaluate after earnings call settles, watch for reclaim of 560 on volume. INDUSINDBK — strong Q4 turnaround, watch for breakout setup. SUNPHARMA — Organon deal digestion, monitor 7-10 days. Avoid all binary earnings names this week (Adani group, Granules Apr 29, HUL Apr 30).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed with multiple binary earnings events in next 3 days (AUBANK today, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30). Priority is risk reduction, not new entries. Exiting AUBANK pre-earnings to free ~INR 184k cash. Trailing SLs on MAHABANK, NESTLEIND, NTPC to lock in gains/zero risk. Power cluster (NTPC) and FMCG cluster (NESTLE + HUL) are at appropriate weights — no further adds. Five-day win rate is poor (6%) so discipline matters more than activity."
}
